description_long: This is a modern athletic running shoe featuring a predominantly black upper with green and yellow accents, constructed from a breathable mesh material. The midsole is thick and textured, with a gradient color transition from green at the front to orange at the heel, suggesting advanced cushioning technology. The shoe has a low-cut design for ankle mobility and a reinforced heel counter for stability. Black laces are threaded through eyelets integrated into the upper, and a pull tab is present at the heel for easy wearing. Subtle branding elements, including a small swoosh and a circular logo on the tongue, are visible. The overall appearance suggests a high-performance, urban-oriented sneaker suitable for running or casual wear.
description: A black athletic running shoe with green and orange accents, mesh upper, and thick cushioned sole, featuring subtle branding and a modern design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the heel counter, pull tab, and the orange gradient on the midsole.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the green and black mesh upper, green midsole accent, and visible swoosh logo.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the lacing system, circular tongue logo, and the toe box with green detailing.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the orange heel cushioning, black mesh upper, and subtle swoosh logo.
attribute_logo: Small green swoosh on the side and toe, circular logo on the tongue
